text: Every morning, I wake up at six o'clock and start my day with a glass of water and a short walk. After a quick breakfast, I head to work, where I typically handle meetings and complete tasks from nine to five. In the afternoon, I make time for exercise — usually a 30-minute run or yoga session. Consistency is key, so this helps me stay energized. Once I get home, I prepare dinner, read for a while, and unwind with a TV show. I follow the same pattern most days, which keeps my routine simple and stress-free.
